title: LAirsTNT
description: A mod that adds 26 new TNT ideas to Minecraft. They can be obtained from a new villager job.
body:
# LAir's TNT

This mod adds **26 brand-new TNT variants** to Minecraft, all inspired by ideas and suggestions from my subscribers.
Each TNT has its own unique behavior: some are designed to cause **massive damage**, while others are more **useful or funny**.  
Not all of them explode right away… and some don’t explode at all.

---

## 🟢 Slime TNT
This TNT takes the form of a **living slime**.

![Big slime TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c4ffb99cecc0be0621c089eeb856911b7fa820a.webp)

When activated, it splits multiple times just like a regular slime. Once all slimes reach their **smallest size**, they **detonate simultaneously**, causing massive damage to both **players** and the **terrain**.


![3 Medium slime tnt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dcdeb4385162dfa33b96a9ed72e02b453c8dddf.webp)

![Small slime TNTs exploding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9bd39447afc0efb75fa52052cfed83f7f212008.webp)
---

## 🪱 Infested TNT
Instead of exploding immediately, this TNT comes to life and **chases the player** who ignited it.  
If you manage to escape in time, it won’t explode and will **drop itself**, allowing you to reuse it to trap other players :)

![Walking tnt inside of the infested TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2922afe3264ee25a23b22fa5f801bef6761bd74.webp)
---

## 🕳️ Black Hole TNT
This TNT creates a **gigantic black hole** that slowly grows over time.  

![Block hole tnt before explosion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d024459f07f212e648db7798485e477a8bd747b3.webp)

Everything in its path is exploded. Eventually, the black hole collapses but running far away is **highly recommended**.

![The block hole or black hole TNT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0fad366d09b80a6e5f11ee78e247bb8ef3b5c388.webp)
---

# Discover all TNTs
I created those TNTs for a youtube video, so if you understand french or can read subtitles, feel free to check it out :
